textPlain: > This is an artist's impression of a runaway supermassive black hole thatI thought this would have been the first job to go this decade. Disappointed to be honest but I'm glad someone found a way to get paid for that kind of creative expression

Imagine a early universe the annhilation light pressure creating enormous black holes and anti black holes, some of those barreling into one another creating Bangs, other barreling through the medium in fast ping pong movements.
Absolutely fascinating. Hubble pictures are always mind blowing.
